stemHtml:
Refer to figure or chart E(LO)2 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
The Lamber chart has its standard parallels at 37°N and 65°N. An aircraft is flying at (N55°00.0', W011°00.0') position and its magnetic heading is 136°. The relative bearing from the aircraft to the Donegal NDB (CFN) (N55° 02.6' , W008° 20.4') is 318°. The true bearing to be plotted from the NDB to the aircraft position is...
